mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO ${datatablename} ( time, id_device, error, low_alarm, high_alarm, Upv1, Upv2, Upv3, Upv4, Upv5, Upv6, Ipv1, Ipv2, Ipv3, Ipv4, Ipv5, Ipv6, Uac1, Uac2, Uac3, Iac1, Iac2, Iac3, Status, Temp, cos, fac, Pac, Qac, Eac ) VALUES ( #{time}, #{id_device}, #{error}, #{low_alarm}, #{high_alarm}, #{Upv1}, #{Upv2}, #{Upv3}, #{Upv4}, #{Upv5}, #{Upv6}, #{Ipv1}, #{Ipv2}, #{Ipv3}, #{Ipv4}, #{Ipv5}, #{Ipv6}, #{Uac1}, #{Uac2}, #{Uac3}, #{Iac1}, #{Iac2}, #{Iac3}, #{Status}, #{Temp}, #{cos}, #{fac}, #{Pac}, #{Qac}, #{Eac} )
